full_text:
Xiahou [unknown] (Wenning) 夏侯? (文寧)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou [unknown] (夏侯?), styledWenning (文寧). Served as Chancellor of Liang. Xiahou [unknown] was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
